failure_modes.cause: DMF decomposes at T > 150°C producing CO and dimethylamine, autocatalytic reaction
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant temperature monitoring with emergency cooling and flow shutdown at T > 155°C

failure_modes.cause: Product crystallization in 16m tube at high conversion (X=0.82) and low flow rate
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline dilution port at 80% tube length to reduce supersaturation

failure_modes.mode: Pump failure under high temperature DMF
failure_modes.cause: DMF vapor pressure 0.13 bar at 150°C causes cavitation in low-flow pump
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurize feed reservoir to 1.5 bar and use high-temperature rated pump seals

single_points_of_failure: 16m reactor tube - blockage stops production with no bypass
validation_experiments: Heat DMF to 160°C for 30 min, analyze for decomposition products by GC-MS
Run reaction at X=0.9 with gradual cooling to identify precipitation onset temperature
Test pump performance with DMF at 150°C and Q=0.057 mL/min for 4 hours continuous operation
